audit_status.source_base: Greek Ephesians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for cosmic blessing, election/adoption, mystery, summing up all things, Spirit seal/pledge, prayer for wisdom, fullness/body imagery.

verses.restored: Paul, apostle of Messiah Jesus through the will of the Divine, to the holy ones who are in Ephesus and trusting ones in Messiah Jesus:
Grace to you and peace from Divine our Father and Lord Jesus Messiah.
Blessed is the Divine and Father of our Lord Jesus Messiah, the One blessing us in every spiritual blessing in the heavenlies in Messiah,
just as he chose us in him before the foundation of world, for us to be holy and blameless before him in love,
having marked us beforehand for adoption/placing-as-children through Jesus Messiah into himself, according to the good pleasure of his will,
into praise of glory of his grace, with which he graced us in the Beloved,
in whom we have redemption/release through his blood, the release/forgiveness of trespasses, according to the riches of his grace,
which he caused to abound into us in all wisdom and insight,
making known to us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he set forth in him,
for stewardship/administration of the fullness of the seasons, to sum up/gather under one head all things in Messiah, things upon the heavens and things upon the earth, in him.
In him also we were allotted inheritance, having been marked beforehand according to the purpose of the One working all things according to the counsel of his will,
so that we might be into praise of his glory, we who hoped beforehand in Messiah.
In him you also, having heard the word of truth, the good news of your salvation/healing, in whom also having trusted, were sealed with the holy Spirit of promise,
who is pledge/down payment of our inheritance, into redemption/release of the possession, into praise of his glory.
Because of this, I also, having heard of your trust in the Lord Jesus and the love toward all the holy ones,
do not cease giving thanks for you, making remembrance in my prayers,
that the Divine of our Lord Jesus Messiah, the Father of glory, may give you Spirit of wisdom and unveiling in knowledge of him,
the eyes of your heart having been illuminated, so that you may know what is the hope of his calling, what are the riches of glory of his inheritance in the holy ones,
and what is the surpassing greatness of his power into us who trust, according to the working of the strength of his might,
which he worked in Messiah, raising him from the dead and seating him at his right hand in the heavenlies,
far above every ruler and authority and power and lordship and every name being named, not only in this age but also in the coming one.
And he subjected all things under his feet and gave him as head over all things to the assembly,
which is his body, the fullness of the One filling all things in all.

translation_notes: Ephesians 1:3-14 is one long blessing in Greek; compact verse rendering preserves cascading movement.
Anakephalaiosasthai in 1:10 is rendered sum up/gather under one head to preserve cosmic recapitulation/headship range.
The assembly as body/fullness in 1:22-23 is cosmic and organic, not institutional control language.
